common.appTagline: Lighten the burden on your mind
common.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

landing.heroDescription: Taking care of your mental health means loving yourself. You are not alone here — your family, community, and experts are with you.
landing.step1Desc: Enter your name, age, and gender
landing.step2Desc: 15 simple questions to help understand your mental state
landing.step3Desc: Get your health assessment and recommendations
landing.trustNote: Your information is completely private and secure
landing.stat3Desc: Your data stays on your phone
landing.emergencyDesc: If you are in crisis, contact immediately

personalInfo.title: Personal Information
personalInfo.subtitle: Please share some information about yourself. This information is completely confidential.
personalInfo.name: Full Name

errors.nameMin: Name must be at least 2 characters

questions.q1: Are you basically satisfied with your life?
questions.q2: Have you dropped many of your activities and interests?
questions.q3: Do you feel that your life is empty?
questions.q5: Are you in good spirits most of the time?
questions.q6: Are you afraid that something bad is going to happen to you?
questions.q7: Do you feel happy most of the time?
questions.q9: Do you prefer to stay at home, rather than going out and doing new things?
questions.q10: Do you feel you have more problems with memory than most?
questions.q11: Do you think it is wonderful to be alive now?
questions.q12: Do you feel pretty worthless the way you are now?
questions.q13: Do you feel full of energy?
questions.q14: Do you feel that your situation is hopeless?
questions.q15: Do you think that most people are better off than you are?

normal.label: Normal
normal.description: Your mental health looks good. Regular exercise, time with family, and meditation practice help maintain this state.
normal.advice: Maintain your good state and share happiness with your loved ones.

mild.label: Mild Challenge
mild.description: You are experiencing some mental difficulty. This is common — talk to family and spend time on your interests.
mild.advice: Talk to someone you trust. Seek expert help if needed.

moderate.label: Moderate Challenge
moderate.description: You are experiencing moderate mental difficulty. Please seek expert help — asking for help is courage, not weakness.
moderate.advice: Consult a mental health professional. You can contact your nearby hospital.

severe.label: Immediate Help Needed
severe.description: You need immediate mental health expert help. Please talk to someone today.
severe.advice: Please contact family or an expert immediately. You are not alone.

community.title: Community
community.subtitle: You are not alone — welcome to our community
community.supportGroupsDesc: Connect with people who share similar experiences

events.e1Desc: Every Sunday at 6 AM — Local Temple Grounds
events.e2Desc: Every Wednesday at 3 PM — Social Welfare Center
events.e3Desc: First Saturday of month — TPO Nepal

resources.title: Support Center
resources.subtitle: Experts and services near you
resources.psychiatristsDesc: Experienced psychiatrists who can speak your language
resources.emergencyNote: If you are in crisis, call 1166 immediately
